entity: Russell Westbrook 2016-17 season (OKC, Regular): 82 GP, 31.6 PPG, 10.7 RPG, 10.4 APG, 42 triple-doubles — the first season since Oscar Robertson (1961-62) to average a triple-double, and the first of Westbrook's four triple-double seasons

query_target.sql: SELECT season_year, season_type, CAST(gp AS INTEGER) AS gp, avg_pts, avg_reb, avg_ast FROM agg_player_season WHERE player_id = 201566 AND season_year = '2016-17' AND season_type = 'Regular' LIMIT 1

notes: Retired player (no longer in NBA as of 2025-26); match:containsObject with exact values. team_abbreviation is omitted because agg_player_season.team_abbreviation is unreliable (shows 'SEA' for Westbrook's OKC seasons); the curated getPlayerProfile query re-derives it from team_id via dim_team_history. The fixture pins per-game averages and GP only.
